reason: Tested agent navigation, status verification, message sending, and response validation for agent QA-20260616-171641-741f
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing available agents
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260616-171641-741f" in the sidebar — Agent was selected and home page displayed with message input field
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator in top right showed "idle" status as required
Clicked message input field and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was successfully entered in the input textbox and send button became enabled
Clicked send button to submit message — Message was sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", new session "Simple Math Question Session" was created in the sidebar
Waited up to 3 minutes for agent response — Agent responded within 3 seconds with the answer
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Agent response clearly shows "4" which is the correct answer to 2+2, with status "Worked for 3s". Screenshot saved as step6-response-received.png
